text:
Luck Bankbook (幸運通帳) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game. This book allows you to turn luck into money.
__NOTOC__

|align=center colspan="3"|Refrain from using the little things of good luck in your daily life, and you can accumulate and convert them into cash.

Summary

Luck Bankbook 幸運通帳 - This card allows its user to convert their use of good luck into money. To be more precise, it converts the user's ability to not act upon their good luck. In order to make any money from this card, you need to choose not to be lucky. (This does not make you unlucky!! It simply doesn't make you especially lucky.)

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.013 - 幸運通帳 
日々のささやかな幸運を使わずに、この通帳にためておくと、その運を金額に換算して引き出すことが出来る。
|-
![Eng]
|No.013 - Luck Bankbook 
Without using good luck everyday, this passbook allows you to draw out money.
|}
